entities.description: As a subsection of 'Experimental Details' within the BookRAG paper, this section details the specific text prompts engineered and utilized to guide the Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system in processing complex documents.
Refers to the structured input instructions provided to the language model to elicit specific behaviors or outputs, as defined in section A.3.

relations.description: The concept of 'Prompts' is the primary topic of section A.3.
